strengths: 16+ years full-stack experience with proven expertise in primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js) across multiple senior roles
Current role explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development—a directly required skill
Demonstrates strong architecture mindset, TDD discipline, and software craftsmanship emphasis throughout career
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest despite these being primary stack tools; Node.js foundation is solid but framework-specific ramp-up required
Recent work (Optilyz, current role) emphasizes pricing optimization and automation over building/scaling complex backend services or high-throughput microservices
Authentication, authorization, and security expertise not highlighted in resume despite being explicitly required
response.justification: Bogdan brings 16+ years of full-stack development with demonstrated expertise in the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js). His current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development—directly matching a required skill. He shows strong architecture mindset and testing discipline. The primary gap is the absence of Nest.js and Vitest in the resume; while his Node.js foundation is solid, these specific frameworks would require some onboarding. Overall, a highly capable mid-senior engineer with modern infrastructure knowledge, though some ramp-up time on specific tooling would be expected.
